tool_args.label: Committee on Operations Regular Meeting - November 29, 2022

payload.description: Regular Meeting Committee on Operations of the MTA New York City Transit Authority, Manhattan and Bronx Surface Transit Operating Authority, Staten Island Rapid Transit Operating Authority, and MTA Bus Company
Board approved the Committee Minutes of the MTA and MTA Agencies Regular Committee meeting held on October 24, 2022
Uses Artificial Intelligence to create maintenance repair plans before failures actually occur
Effectuates station and facility improvements during weekend closures
Two initiatives to deter fare evasion
Accessibility initiative discussed at more than thirty events
Strategies underway to improve customer satisfaction including bus network redesigns
Award of two modifications to exercise options for the purchase of 289 low-floor 40-foot diesel buses for MTA Bus Company in the combined estimated amount of $230.7M

tool_args.label: Procurement Award - JBA Change Management Consulting

payload.description: Award to JBA Change Management Corporation for consulting services for the Department of Subways, Maintenance of Way Division, in the amount of $31.4M

tool_args.label: Procurement Modification - OMNY CVM Software/Hardware Enhancements

payload.description: Modification to multi-agency contract with Cubic Transportation Systems Inc. for New Fare Pay System-OMNY to implement software and hardware enhancements to 2,375 Configurable Vending Machines (CVMs) in the amount of $27.5M
Ratification of an Immediate Operating Need and approval of the award made to Transit Sourcing Services, Inc., for the purchase of 10,000 subway car wheels in the amount of $14.8M
Total procurement package which included five actions in the amount of $304.4M
Combined estimated amount for purchase of 289 low-floor 40-foot diesel buses
Nova Bus, Inc. will provide 173 buses in the estimated amount of $137.35M
New Flyer of America, Inc. will provide 116 diesel buses in the estimated amount of $93.35M
Nova Bus, Inc. will provide 173 buses
New Flyer of America, Inc. will provide 116 diesel buses
Software and hardware enhancements to 2,375 Configurable Vending Machines (CVMs)
Purchase of 10,000 subway car wheels
Total purchase of 289 low-floor 40-foot diesel buses for MTA Bus Company

tool_args.label: Additional Officers Deployed to Subway System

payload.raw_value_text: an additional 1,200 officers have been deployed to the subway system
payload.description: President Davey reported an additional 1,200 officers have been deployed to the subway system
Award to JBA Change Management Corporation for consulting services in the amount of $31.4M
Modification with Cubic Transportation Systems Inc. for New Fare Pay System-OMNY in the amount of $27.5M
Purchase of 10,000 subway car wheels in the amount of $14.8M

tool_args.label: Customer Satisfaction Goal - 10% Increase by June 2024

payload.claim_text: The goal is to increase customer satisfaction by at least 10% by June of 2024
payload.subject: customer satisfaction

payload.claim_text: Customers stated most improvement is needed with respect to: (1) faster, more frequent service; (2) cleaner stations and vehicles; (3) safer environment; (4) better weekend service; and (5) enhanced communications
payload.subject: customer satisfaction

payload.claim_text: Several strategies underway to improve customer satisfaction including the bus network redesigns, the creation of additional bus lanes, and tracking outcome-based performance metrics
payload.subject: bus lane creation

payload.claim_text: The rollout of OMNY continues to go well
payload.subject: OMNY rollout

payload.claim_text: The Department of Subways recently installed tactile warning strips on multiple platform edges in several stations
payload.subject: tactile warning strips

tool_args.label: NYPD and MTA Partnership on Fare Evasion

payload.claim_text: He stated he looks forward to working with Mr. Diehl to address the fare evasion problem
payload.subject: fare evasion
payload.description: Partnership between NYPD and MTA to address fare evasion

tool_args.label: NYPD Reported Increase in Felonies and Robberies

payload.claim_text: There have been many challenges including increases in felonies and robberies. Arrests have substantially increased as well. Summonses for quality-of-life crimes have also increased
payload.subject: crime

tool_args.label: Grand Larcenies Increase and Anti-Pickpocket Team

payload.claim_text: He noted an increase in grand larcenies, and advised everyone to be vigilant against pick-pocketers during the holiday season. A dedicated anti-pick-pocket team has been created
payload.subject: grand larcenies
